Package microui.event

package microui.event
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    microui
     
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractEventSystem
    Abstract base class for event detection systems in MicroUI.
    Event
    Concrete implementation of AbstractEventSystem providing direct access to all mouse event states.
    EventType
    Enumeration defining all possible mouse event types detected by the MicroUI event system.
    InteractionHandler
    Advanced event handler that manages event listeners and dispatches events to registered callbacks.
    Listener
    Functional interface for event listeners in the MicroUI framework.
